description: Create a precision technical drawing of a 96-well microplate (ANSI/SLAS 1-2004 standard) in LibreCAD, saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/microplate_template.dxf. The drawing must feature three layers: 'OUTLINE' (Color: White/7), 'WELLS' (Color: Cyan/4), and 'LABELS' (Color: Yellow/2). The 'OUTLINE' layer must contain the plate footprint as a 127.76 mm x 85.48 mm rectangle with the top-left corner at (0, 0) extending to (127.76, -85.48). The 'WELLS' layer must contain 96 circular wells (6.5 mm diameter) arranged in an 8-row by 12-column grid with a 9.0 mm pitch in both X and Y directions, with the center of Well A1 located at (14.38, -11.24). The 'LABELS' layer must include text labels 'A1', 'A12', 'H1', and 'H12' positioned near their respective corner wells.
